channel.title: Daily AI Digest
channel.description: Curated AI/ML signals — zero LLMs, pure algorithmic curation

item.title: Humanoid-GPT: Scaling Data and Structure for Zero-Shot Motion Tracking
item.description: 📄 New in cs.RO, cs.AI — We introduce Humanoid-GPT, a GPT-style Transformer with causal attention trained on a billion-scale motion corpus for whole-body control. Unlike prior shallow MLP trackers constrained by scarce data and an agility-generalization trade-off, Humanoid-GPT is pre-trained on a 2B-frame retargeted corp...

item.title: Language Models Need Sleep: Learning to Self-Modify and Consolidate Memories
item.description: 📄 New in cs.LG, cs.AI — The past few decades have witnessed significant advances in the design of machine learning algorithms, from early studies on task-specific shallow models to more general deep Large Language Models (LLMs). Despite showing promising results in tasks that require instant prediction or in-context lea...

item.title: Value-Aware Stochastic KV Cache Eviction for Reasoning Models
item.description: 📄 New in cs.LG, cs.CL — Reasoning models improve accuracy through extended chains of thought, but their long outputs create a memory and compute bottleneck. KV cache eviction methods reduce this cost by evicting unimportant key-value pairs from the cache, yet they often yield worse accuracy than selection-based sparse a...

item.title: SEAOTTER: Sensor Embedded Autoencoding with One-Time Transcode for Efficient Reconstruction
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV, cs.LG — In robotics systems, vast amounts of visual data are easily captured at high resolution using low-cost, low-power hardware. Yet, limited bandwidth and on-device compute resources prevent full utilization when transmitted via conventional codecs like JPEG/MPEG. Newer codecs, like AV1/AVIF, improve...

item.title: Online Learning with Gradient-Variation Interval Regret
item.description: 📄 New in cs.LG, stat.ML — This paper investigates non-stationary online learning using the metric of interval regret, which requires an online algorithm to perform well over every time interval. We propose the first online learning algorithm that achieves an interval regret bound scaling with gradient variation, a fundame...

item.title: Forecasting Conceptual Diffusion in Science: The Case of Quantum Computing
item.description: 📄 New in cs.SI, cs.CY — Understanding and anticipating scientific change requires models that distinguish between endogenous consolidation and exogenous diffusion of scientific concepts. Using the quantum computing subtree of concepts in OpenAlex, we construct a temporally resolved concept co-occurrence network and trac...

item.title: Analytical Evaluation of DCA Convergence Properties for Minimizing Prediction Functions of Gaussian RBF Support Vector Regression
item.description: 📄 New in cs.LG, stat.ML — For nonconvex optimization problems whose objective is the prediction function of a trained Support Vector Regression (SVR) model with the Gaussian radial basis function (RBF) kernel (RBF-SVR), we present a framework that applies the difference of convex functions (DC) algorithm (DCA) by exploiti...

item.title: anthropics / claude-code
item.description: ⭐ 295 GitHub stars today · ⭐ 129.8k total stars — Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

item.title: chopratejas / headroom
item.description: ⭐ 1.3k GitHub stars today — Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

item.title: harry0703 / MoneyPrinterTurbo
item.description: ⭐ 933 GitHub stars today · ⭐ 78.5k total stars — 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.

item.title: From Local LLMs to the Cloud: Building and Deploying My First AI SQL Query Explainer

item.title: stefan-jansen / machine-learning-for-trading
item.description: ⭐ 716 GitHub stars today · ⭐ 18.9k total stars — Code for Machine Learning for Algorithmic Trading, 2nd edition.
